description: Schema fragment (menu_generic.json). Merged into src/schema.json by src/schema/build.py. Do not load directly -- cross-fragment $ref uses '#/definitions/...' against the bundled output.

menu_generic.description: Generic fallback for menus that don't have a per-entity schema. Either a list of items or a mapping of sub-menus with optional `_items`.

item_generic.description: Generic RouterOS operation, used as fallback. Permissive on property names so any RouterOS property passes through.

operation.description: RouterOS verb: `add` creates a new row, `set` updates a row matched by `filter`. Example: `add`.

filter.description: RouterOS find expression used by `set` to locate the target row. Example: `[find default-name=ether1]`.

id.description: Stable IaC identity token rendered into the row's RouterOS `comment=` and used by drift/import to track rows across runs. Example: `iac.bridge.lan`.

id_pad.description: Number of trailing dot-separated segments of `id` to keep when sorting/grouping rows. Example: `1`.

comment.description: Free-form text appended to the RouterOS `comment=` after the `id` token. Example: `"LAN bridge"`.
